discoveries.name: Claude Agent SDK
discoveries.why_it_matters: This session is already running on it. Core infrastructure for all JARVIS OPS operations.
discoveries.notes: The foundation JARVIS OPS runs on.

discoveries.name: yt-dlp
discoveries.why_it_matters: Powers ops-room content intelligence. Extracts YouTube/Instagram metadata and transcripts.

discoveries.name: Doppler CLI
discoveries.why_it_matters: Centralized secrets management across all Moe AI projects. Eliminates .env sprawl.
benefits: Single source of truth for secrets
discoveries.integration_effort: low — doppler-sync.sh already written. Needs CLI install + project config.

discoveries.name: obra/superpowers
discoveries.why_it_matters: 239k⭐ agentic skills framework for Claude Code using subagent-driven development. Directly applicable to JARVIS OPS architecture.
benefits: Subagent skills model matches our ops-room pattern
risks: Shell scripts need review before adoption
discoveries.integration_effort: medium — review skills model, adapt compatible patterns into ops-room/enhancer/
discoveries.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

discoveries.name: langchain-ai/langchain
discoveries.why_it_matters: 140k⭐ industry-standard agent orchestration. Useful for multi-step workflows in start-of-play and future Moe AI projects.
discoveries.integration_effort: medium — pip install langchain-anthropic. Best for complex agentic pipelines.

discoveries.name: FoundationAgents/MetaGPT
discoveries.why_it_matters: 69k⭐ multi-agent framework that simulates a software company with roles (Engineer, PM, Architect). Relevant for start-of-play's autonomous operations mission.
benefits: Role-based agent structure matches JARVIS OPS
risks: May be overengineered for current project scale
discoveries.integration_effort: high — significant learning curve. Evaluate for start-of-play specifically.
discoveries.description: First AI Software Company, Towards Natural Language Programming.

discoveries.name: microsoft/autogen
discoveries.why_it_matters: 59k⭐ multi-agent conversation framework from Microsoft. Good for orchestrating multiple AI agents in parallel.
risks: CC-BY-4.0 license — check commercial use terms
discoveries.integration_effort: medium — pip install autogen. License review required before commercial use.
discoveries.description: A programming framework for agentic AI.

discoveries.name: crewAIInc/crewAI
discoveries.why_it_matters: 54k⭐ role-based multi-agent orchestration. Closest framework to JARVIS OPS's crew metaphor — agents with defined roles, tools, and goals.
risks: Vendor has commercial product — ensure OSS version stays sufficient
discoveries.integration_effort: low-medium — pip install crewai. Could power start-of-play's autonomous operations.
discoveries.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents.

discoveries.name: hangwin/mcp-chrome
discoveries.why_it_matters: 12k⭐ Chrome MCP server. Gives JARVIS OPS browser automation capability — scraping, form filling, screenshot analysis — all via Claude tool calls.
risks: Chrome extension required — not headless by default
discoveries.integration_effort: medium — install Chrome extension, configure MCP server in claude settings.
discoveries.description: Chrome MCP Server — exposes Chrome browser to AI assistants.

discoveries.name: modelcontextprotocol/registry
discoveries.why_it_matters: Official MCP server registry. Use as the discovery source for all future MCP server research — one place to find vetted integrations.
discoveries.integration_effort: none — use as reference, not a library. Browse at github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry

discoveries.name: executeautomation/mcp-playwright
discoveries.why_it_matters: 5.5k⭐ Playwright MCP server. Headless browser automation via Claude — better than mcp-chrome for server-side/CI use cases. Chromium pre-installed in this environment.
risks: Playwright version pinning required (Chromium is pre-installed at fixed version)
discoveries.integration_effort: low — npm install, configure MCP. Playwright already available in this session.
discoveries.description: Playwright MCP Server — automate Browsers and APIs in Claude.

discoveries.name: xorbitsai/inference (Xinference)
discoveries.why_it_matters: 9.4k⭐ swap any open-source LLM with one line of code behind an OpenAI-compatible API. Relevant if Moe AI projects need local/self-hosted model fallbacks.
risks: Significant compute requirements for large models
Not needed if Claude API is primary
discoveries.integration_effort: medium — pip install xinference. Only pursue if self-hosted LLM is a goal.
discoveries.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code.

discoveries.name: oumi-ai/oumi
discoveries.why_it_matters: 9.3k⭐ fine-tuning and deployment for open LLMs (Gemma, Qwen, DeepSeek, GPT-OSS). Relevant if Moe AI wants custom fine-tuned models.
discoveries.integration_effort: high — only pursue if custom model fine-tuning is a project goal.
discoveries.description: Easily fine-tune, evaluate and deploy open source LLMs / VLMs.

discoveries.name: golutra/golutra
discoveries.why_it_matters: 3.7k⭐ multi-agent orchestration platform unifying Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw with parallel execution and long-running workflows. Very close to what JARVIS OPS is building.
risks: License unclear — must verify before any use
discoveries.integration_effort: medium — evaluate architecture patterns only until license is confirmed.
discoveries.description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

discoveries.name: appcypher/awesome-mcp-servers
discoveries.why_it_matters: 5.6k⭐ curated list of all MCP servers. Use as the primary catalogue when looking for new integrations for JARVIS OPS.
risks: Not all listed servers are high quality — evaluate before adopting
discoveries.description: Awesome MCP Servers — curated list of Model Context Protocol servers.

discoveries.name: getsentry/XcodeBuildMCP
discoveries.why_it_matters: 5.9k⭐ Xcode MCP server from Sentry. Only relevant if Moe AI has iOS/macOS projects.
risks: macOS only — not applicable in current Linux environment
discoveries.integration_effort: low — but only relevant for iOS/macOS projects. Track for future.
discoveries.description: MCP server for iOS and macOS project automation.
